privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world San Francisco UrbanSim public data (sanfran_public.h5) downloaded from the UDST GitHub repository. I independently ran the data analysis required by the prompt against the actual HDF5 dataset, verifying that exactly 67 zones meet the filtering criteria. The highest index value matches zone_id 159.0 (with a transition index of ~2.07). The expected output paths for the CSV, plot, and notebook match the prompt's instructions and the evaluation scripts exactly. All required thresholds and column names from the prompt precisely match the metadata and verifier configuration.
